subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thanks for the note — I’d be glad to set up a meeting. A few slots that work on our side are: 
- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00 UTC
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00 UTC
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00 UTC

Let me know which window you’d prefer. I can’t share internal contact details, but public information is available on our website.

Best,
Agent
